reviews.comment:
Muy agradable para descansar durante el viaje. Tiene juegos para niños, restaurantes, parador de descanso, admiten mascotas.

(Translated by Google)
A very pleasant place to relax during your trip. It has children's playgrounds, restaurants, a rest stop, and pets are welcome.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURNaS1IZm5BRRAB

reviews.comment:
Pase 2 veces, Noviembre y Diciembre. La canilla que tienen en la playa de estacionamiento seguia inutilizable. Es un lugar donde uno puede lavar el mate o cargar agua. Que clase de servicio es ese? O como ese grifo no esta arancelado nadie se preocupa en repararlo? Adjunto fotos para que corroboren

(Translated by Google)
I went twice, in November and December. The tap in the parking lot was still unusable. It's a place where you can wash your mate gourd or fill up your water bottle. What kind of service is that? Or since that tap isn't charged, does nobody care to fix it? I've attached photos for your reference.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURNbGZtUVp3EAE
